race.description: Sportsbet Caulfield Cup Carnival Hospitality Hcp (Bm78)
race.comment: Giving SKIPPERS CANYON (5) another chance. He'd been racing so well all preparation until last start when struggling over 2400m at Sandown Hillside. They went very slowly there and he didn't have the turn of foot. Back to 2000m might suit a bit better and his form prior reads very well for this. If he doesn't show up, it's a bit of a raffle. FOIRE DE TRONE (15) has won 2/3 this time in, coming home too strongly off a slow speed at Sandown Lakeside to score narrowly when last seen. She gets in very light for Jabez Johnstone whose claim is a goldmine at the moment. SAVOUR THE DREAM (2) won dominantly over this trip at Mornington last time out and a repeat of that sees him hard to beat again. PROMISED LAND (12) steps up in trip fourth up which should suit. He's come back well and looks set to peak now.
